BTC.reasoning: Extreme Fear with declining OI and near-neutral funding points to advanced deleveraging (contrarian lean), yet persistently high L/S (>2) and taker selling pressure keep momentum risk alive. Readings conflict; no clear directional edge.

ETH.reasoning: Extreme Fear (8) weighed as momentum: longs remain crowded (L/S 2.3-3.2), OI stable/fluctuating without deleveraging, taker ratio mostly <1 shows sell pressure. Negative funding adds short aggression but no clear short squeeze setup. Mixed signals prevent directional bias.
